ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symmetry_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symmetry operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the symmetry operation (e.g., rotation, reflection) */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of symmetry operation (e.g., rotational, reflection) */,
  "operation_matrix" TEXT /* Matrix representation of the symmetry operation */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the symmetry operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "point_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the point group */,
  "group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the point group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the point group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "space_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the space group */,
  "group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the space group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the space group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irreducible_representations" (
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irreducible representation */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the representation belongs to */,
  "representation_name" TEXT /* Name of the irreducible representation */,
  "representation_dimension" INTEGER /* Dimension of the irreducible representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irreducible_representations_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES point_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irreducible representation the character belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the character belongs to */,
  "character_value" REAL /* Value of the character */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES irreducible_representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matrix_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matrix element */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irreducible representation the element belongs to */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row of the matrix element */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column of the matrix element */,
  "element_value" REAL /* Value of the matrix element */,
  "element_description" TEXT /* Description of the matrix element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matrix_elements_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES irreducible_representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "researcher_description" TEXT /* Description of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computations" (
  "computation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the computation belongs to */,
  "computation_type" TEXT /* Type of computation (e.g., character table calculation, matrix element calculation) */,
  "computation_result" TEXT /* Result of the computation */,
  "computation_description" TEXT /* Description of the computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("computation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaboration belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the publication belongs to */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_description" TEXT /* Description of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symmetry_operation_matrices" (
  "matrix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matrix */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symmetry operation the matrix belongs to */,
  "matrix_elements" TEXT /* Elements of the matrix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matrix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symmetry_operation_matrices_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES symmetry_operations ("operation_id")
)
